title: Lead Investment Banker at India Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at India Ratings
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
